creator: team_sus@outlook.com
text:
Created attachment 244294
5 sec delay Packet provided for inverstigation

Hi experts , 
  
We are using Version as unspecified because there is no option for FreeBSD 11.2 RELEASE provided. Experiencing a delay of 5 sec in TCP communication with slow client and Fast server ie when the client send and small window size this issue is happening  . 
Client is an Red hat machine and Server OS is FreeBSD 11.2 . 
There is less traffic in the scenario. The same test is done with 10.4 and no such issue is seeing. 
Only difference in setup is we upgraded the 10.4 FreeBSD to 11.2. Providing the Packet capture for 11.2 Server packets. Cap for verification. The following are the observation: 
  
1.Packet number 367 with window size 1428 is send from client (10.30.75.26) to the server (10.4.7.5) 
2. You can see a delay of 4.99 from the Server side to acknowledge the client . 
3. Only when Window size is increased by the client  then only server is responding to client 
4. A deadlock is happening when it reach max TCP payload ie 1428 . 
  
Extract from wireshark of 1428 window size :
